translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_22 is a locked-limit day detector (EVENT category, NEUTRAL direction). Entry conditions detect when open == high == low == close, indicating no trading occurred. This is a market event flag rather than a directional trade signal. Entry conditions check OHLC equality; exit is triggered when the locked-limit condition resolves (any price movement). No long/short entries or exits are specified since direction is NEUTRAL.
